changeSet.author: nour
changeSet.sql:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS chat ( id BIGINT GENERATED BY DEFAULT AS IDENTITY PRIMARY KEY, participant_one BIGINT NOT NULL, participant_two BIGINT NOT NULL, listing_id BIGINT, last_message_at TIMESTAMPTZ, is_deleted BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT FALSE, deleted_at TIMESTAMPTZ, deleted_by VARCHAR(255), created_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW(), updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW(), created_by VARCHAR(255), updated_by VARCHAR(255) );
COMMENT ON TABLE chat IS 'Marketplace conversation between two users, optionally linked to a listing'; COMMENT ON COLUMN chat.participant_one IS 'Lower user_profile.id — enforced by application to guarantee canonical ordering'; COMMENT ON COLUMN chat.participant_two IS 'Higher user_profile.id — enforced by application to guarantee canonical ordering';
